allow: Bash(cd "C:\\StudioProjects\\my_ai_agent" && ./gradlew installDebug 2>&1 | tail -5 && adb -s RZ8R126899A shell am start -n ua.com.myaiagent/.MainActivity)
Bash(ipconfig 2>&1 | grep "IPv4" && curl -s http://192.168.0.103:8080/mcp -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{}}' 2>&1)

Bash(schtasks /create /tn "AddFirewallRule" /tr "netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=\\"Node MCP 8080\\" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8080" /sc once /st 00:00 /ru SYSTEM /f 2>&1 && schtasks /run /tn "AddFirewallRule" 2>&1 && timeout /t 2 && schtasks /delete /tn "AddFirewallRule" /f 2>&1)

Bash(cmd.exe /c "schtasks /create /tn AddFirewallRule /tr \\"netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name='Node MCP 8080' dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8080\\" /sc once /st 00:00 /ru SYSTEM /f" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "schtasks /create /tn AddFirewallRule /tr 'netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=\\'Node MCP 8080\\' dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8080' /sc once /st 00:00 /ru SYSTEM /f" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'netsh' -Argument 'advfirewall firewall add rule name=\\"Node MCP 8080\\" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8080'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -Once -At \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(3\)
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet
\\$principal = New-ScheduledTaskPrincipal -UserId 'SYSTEM' -RunLevel Highest
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'AddFirewallRule' -Action \\$action -Trigger \\$trigger -Settings \\$settings -Principal \\$principal -Force
Start-Sleep 5
Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'AddFirewallRule' -Confirm:\\$false
" 2>&1)
Bash(adb -s RZ8R126899A shell am start -n ua.com.myaiagent/.MainActivity)
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"')
Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"')
